description: Publicar o projeto como open-source, adicionar template em branco, gerar grafo Graphify e hospedar na Vercel.

userStories.title: Criar template em branco
userStories.description: As a creator, I want to start from a blank canvas so that I can build my own visual template from scratch.
acceptanceCriteria: A visible action creates a blank template
The new blank template appears in the templates list
The blank template can receive layers
userStories.notes: Criado via src/lib/templateFactory.ts e integrado na UI com a acao Novo em branco. Validado no navegador com Playwright.

userStories.title: Preparar contribuicao open-source
userStories.description: As a contributor, I want clear project documentation so that I can run, understand, and improve the app.
acceptanceCriteria: README explains purpose, stack, install, scripts, architecture and contribution flow
userStories.notes: README, CONTRIBUTING, ROADMAP, LICENSE, .gitignore, .graphifyignore e AGENTS.md criados/atualizados.

userStories.title: Gerar grafo de conhecimento
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a knowledge graph so that architecture and relationships are easier to inspect.
userStories.notes: Extracao semantica local via Ollama excedeu o timeout; graphify update . --force gerou grafo estrutural com 233 nodes, 295 edges e 15 communities.

userStories.title: Publicar GitHub e Vercel
userStories.description: As an external user, I want the project online so that I can access it without local setup.
acceptanceCriteria: Public deployment URL is documented in final handoff
userStories.notes: Repositorio publico criado em GitHub e deploy de producao publicado na Vercel. Conexao automatica GitHub->Vercel falhou por permissao da integracao, mas deploy manual esta online.
